name: Peach Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the frozen pie shell from the tin and place it in a buttered pie plate. Sprinkle the bottom of the shell with sugar.
2. Cover the sugar with the peach halves, upside down, arranging them in a spiral pattern starting from the center.
3. Microwave at full power for 5 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg yolk, heavy cream, and apricot liqueur. Pour this mixture over the pie.
5. Continue microwaving at full power for an additional 5 minutes.
Variation: You can substitute dark, sweet, pitted cherries for the peaches or use cognac instead of the apricot liqueur.
Serves 4-6. Microwave time: 10 minutes. Conventional range time: 30 minutes at 350°F.
